posts.text: AI can verify structural designs faster than any human engineer. Ownership of those designs should be provable on-chain. Verifiable records for physical assets are the foundation of a real economy of things.
When we get to Mars, property rights need to be established from day one. None of the old county recorder nonsense. Verifiable, programmable ownership records built on-chain from the start.
Who let the Doge out. Woof.
